response.overview: "Are a athlets athlets from the moment they're born? What about astronauts or idols? These things aren't decided at birth, so... what about witches?"  In a world where witches are said to be born with their powers, Coco lives her life in happiness with a strange obsession for magic. Her days went on working at her mother's tailor shop, until one day, a flying carriage landed in her small village. Beside this magical vehicle that suddenly appeared, she also ran into a charming young man who claims to be a witch.  Little did she know that this strange encounter would change her whole life...
response.title: Witch Hat Atelier
